scripts.build:backend: bun run scripts/generateEmbeddedStatic.ts && bun build --compile --minify --production --target=bun src/backend/server.ts --outfile dist/local-llm-gui
scripts.build: bun run build:frontend && bun run build:backend
scripts.build:win: npm run clean && npm run build:frontend && bun run scripts/generateEmbeddedStatic.ts && bun build --compile --minify --production --target=bun-windows-x64 src/backend/server.ts --outfile dist/local-llm-gui-win.exe
scripts.build:mac: npm run clean && npm run build:frontend && bun run scripts/generateEmbeddedStatic.ts && bun build --compile --minify --production --target=bun-darwin-arm64 src/backend/server.ts --outfile dist/local-llm-gui-mac
scripts.build:linux: npm run clean && npm run build:frontend && bun run scripts/generateEmbeddedStatic.ts && bun build --compile --minify --production --target=bun-linux-x64 src/backend/server.ts --outfile dist/local-llm-gui-linux
scripts.test:all: npm run typecheck && npm run test:attachments:unchecked && npm run test:backend:unchecked && npm run test:e2e:unchecked && npm run test:frontend:unchecked && npm run test:frontend:unit:unchecked
scripts.test:attachments: npm run typecheck && npm run test:attachments:unchecked
scripts.test:backend: npm run typecheck && npm run test:backend:unchecked
scripts.test:backend:files: npm run typecheck && npm run test:backend:files:unchecked --
scripts.test:backend:files:slow: npm run typecheck && npm run test:backend:files:slow:unchecked --
scripts.test:e2e: npm run typecheck && npm run test:e2e:unchecked
scripts.test:frontend: npm run typecheck && npm run test:frontend:unchecked
scripts.test:frontend:unchecked: bun test src/test/frontend --path-ignore-patterns=**/*.spec.ts && playwright test src/test/frontend/
scripts.test:frontend:unit: npm run typecheck && npm run test:frontend:unit:unchecked
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:frontend && bun run typecheck:backend
